cgu.title: Terms of Use
cgu.copy: These terms govern the use of the CYNA-IT platform and its services. By browsing the site, you accept the rules described below.

articles.title: Purpose and scope
paragraphs: These Terms of Use (ToU) set out the conditions under which CYNA-IT makes its platform — accessible at cyna-it.fr — and its cybersecurity services available to its users.
Any use of the site implies full acceptance of these ToU. CYNA-IT reserves the right to amend them at any time to reflect platform or legal changes.

articles.title: Access to the site and services
paragraphs: Access to the site is open to any user with an Internet connection. Some features require a secure client account with a valid email address and a strong password.
CYNA-IT does its best to ensure continuous service availability, but cannot be held liable for interruptions linked to maintenance, third-party attacks, or force majeure.
Users undertake to protect their credentials and to report any fraudulent use of their account to CYNA-IT support without delay.

articles.title: Responsibilities
paragraphs: Users undertake to use the platform in accordance with applicable law and not to harm the security of CYNA-IT or third-party information systems.
Any attempt at intrusion, unauthorized analysis, reverse engineering or denial of service will be prosecuted in accordance with articles 323-1 et seq. of the French Penal Code.
CYNA-IT cannot be held liable for misuse of the cybersecurity solutions provided, nor for indirect damages arising from out-of-spec exploitation.

articles.title: Intellectual property
paragraphs: All content on this site (texts, logos, brands, graphics, source code, illustrations) is the exclusive property of CYNA-IT or its publishing partners.

Any reproduction, representation, modification or distribution, in whole or in part, without prior written authorization, is strictly forbidden and constitutes an act of infringement punishable under articles L.335-2 et seq. of the French Intellectual Property Code.

articles.title: Governing law and jurisdiction
paragraphs: These ToU are governed by French law. Any complaint may be addressed to CYNA-IT support at contact@cyna-it.fr.
Failing an amicable resolution, any dispute relating to the interpretation or execution of these ToU shall be submitted to the courts within the jurisdiction of the Paris Court of Appeal.

legal.title: Legal notice
legal.copy: Information about the publisher of the CYNA-IT site, in accordance with French law n°2004-575 of June 21, 2004 on trust in the digital economy.

items.label: Registered office
items.value: 12 rue de la Cybersécurité, 75011 Paris, France

sections.title: Intellectual property
paragraphs: All content on this site (architecture, texts, illustrations, photographs, brands, logos, graphic identity) is the exclusive property of CYNA-IT or its rights holders.

Any full or partial reproduction of these elements, by any means, without the express authorization of CYNA-IT, is forbidden and constitutes an infringement punishable under articles L.335-2 et seq. of the French Intellectual Property Code.

sections.title: Personal data
paragraphs: CYNA-IT collects and processes personal data in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and the French Data Protection Act of January 6, 1978 as amended.
The data collected is strictly necessary to manage your account, process your orders and improve our services. It is kept for the applicable legal period.
In accordance with the regulations, you have a right to access, rectify, object to, port, and delete your data. These rights can be exercised at dpo@cyna-it.fr.
In the event of a dispute, you may also lodge a complaint with the CNIL (French Data Protection Authority).

sections.title: Cookies
paragraphs: The cyna-it.fr site uses cookies strictly necessary for its operation (authentication, cart) and anonymized audience-measurement cookies.
You can adjust your preferences at any time via the cookie banner or your browser settings.

about.title: CYNA-IT, clearer cybersecurity for companies
about.copy: Since 2018, CYNA-IT has helped IT and business leaders pick, deploy and monitor cybersecurity solutions tailored to their real stakes.
missionParagraphs: Make cybersecurity readable, accessible and actionable for every French company — from industrial SMEs to mid-caps with high regulatory exposure.
Our conviction: a good tool is worth nothing without a clear framework. Every CYNA-IT service is designed to fit our clients' operational reality without overloading their teams.

values.title: Clarity
values.copy: We explain what we offer. No jargon, no vague promises: concrete, measurable deliverables.

values.title: Independence
values.copy: We stay free in our advice. Our recommendations are driven by your context, not by a vendor partner.

values.title: Proximity
values.copy: A dedicated contact, regular check-ins, a reachable team. Relationship over contract.

values.title: Rigor
values.copy: Cybersecurity does not tolerate approximation. We hold our deliverables to the same standard we expect from our tools.

about.ctaCopy: A question, an audit to plan, an urgent need? Our team is quick to reach.
